name: DFRobot mmWave Radar
description: The [DFRobot mmWave Radar](https://wiki.dfrobot.com/mmWave_Radar_Human_Presence_Detection_SKU_SEN0395) (aka `SEN0395`  ) is a 24GHz radar which can be used for human presence detection. It can detect tiny movements and compared to a PIR sensor **it can detect presence continuously**. This can be useful, for example, to turn the lights on when you enter a room, keep them on as long as you are there (without waving your hands at the sensor) and turn them off almost immediately after you leave the room.

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [Uart](https://esphome.io/components/uart/) if you want to use multiple UART buses.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation. Necessary if you want to define multiple instances of this component.
